page_metadata.biotools__summary: 3DSNP is a database linking noncoding Variants to 3D interacting genes. It is an integrated annotation database linking genome-wide noncoding SNPs and small INDELs to 3D interacting genes via chromatin loops.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: 3DSNP is a database linking noncoding Variants to 3D interacting genes. It is an integrated annotation database linking genome-wide noncoding SNPs and small INDELs to 3D interacting genes via chromatin loops.
